mapper.delete: ALTER TABLE AGG_HOST_NIC_FLOW_5M DELETE WHERE TIME < #{time}
mapper.select:
SELECT TD.name as hostName,FLOW.HOST_ID as hostId,
ROUND(sum(RX_FLOW_AVG * if((${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME)) > 300, 300, ${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME))),2) + ROUND(sum(TX_FLOW_AVG * if((${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME)) > 300, 300, ${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME))),2) as allFlowSum
ROUND(sum(RX_FLOW_AVG * if((${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME)) > 300, 300, ${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME))),2) rxFlowSum
ROUND(sum(TX_FLOW_AVG * if((${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME)) > 300, 300, ${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME))),2) txFlowSum
FROM (SELECT HOST_ID, TIME, MAC,
avgMerge(RX_FLOW_AVG) RX_FLOW_AVG, ROUND(avgMerge(TX_FLOW_AVG),2) TX_FLOW_AVG
avgMerge(RX_FLOW_AVG) RX_FLOW_AVG
avgMerge(TX_FLOW_AVG) TX_FLOW_AVG
FROM AGG_HOST_NIC_FLOW_5M WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND HOST_POOL_ID =${hostPoolId}
AND CLUSTER_ID =${clusterId}
AND OP_GROUP_CODE LIKE #{operatorGroupCode}
GROUP BY HOST_POOL_ID, CLUSTER_ID, HOST_ID, MAC, TIME) FLOW, ${@com.h3c.h3cloud.performance.monitor.service.mapper.base.clickhouseMapperConstant@TBL_HOST} TD WHERE TD.id = FLOW.HOST_ID GROUP BY hostId,hostName
ORDER BY allFlowSum DESC
ORDER BY rxFlowSum DESC
ORDER BY txFlowSum DESC
LIMIT ${limit}

SELECT HOST_ID as hostId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
MAC as mac,
ROUND(sum(RX_FLOW_AVG * if((${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME)) > 300, 300, ${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME))),2) + ROUND(sum(TX_FLOW_AVG * if((${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME)) > 300, 300, ${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME))),2) as allFlowSum
ROUND(sum(RX_FLOW_AVG * if((${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME)) > 300, 300, ${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME))),2) rxFlowSum
ROUND(sum(TX_FLOW_AVG * if((${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME)) > 300, 300, ${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME))),2) txFlowSum
FROM (SELECT HOST_ID, TIME, MAC,
avgMerge(RX_FLOW_AVG) RX_FLOW_AVG, ROUND(avgMerge(TX_FLOW_AVG),2) TX_FLOW_AVG
avgMerge(RX_FLOW_AVG) RX_FLOW_AVG
avgMerge(TX_FLOW_AVG) TX_FLOW_AVG
FROM AGG_HOST_NIC_FLOW_5M WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND HOST_ID = ${hostId}
AND HOST_ID in (${hostIds})
GROUP BY HOST_POOL_ID, CLUSTER_ID, HOST_ID, MAC, TIME) FLOW GROUP BY HOST_ID, MAC, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr

SELECT HOST_ID as hostId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
MAC as mac,
ROUND(avgMerge(RX_FLOW_AVG),2) as rxFlowAvg, maxMerge(RX_FLOW_MAX) as rxFlowMax, minMerge(RX_FLOW_MIN) as rxFlowMin
ROUND(avgMerge(TX_FLOW_AVG),2) as txFlowAvg, maxMerge(TX_FLOW_MAX) as txFlowMax, minMerge(TX_FLOW_MIN) as txFlowMin
FROM AGG_HOST_NIC_FLOW_5M detail WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND MAC = #{mac}
AND HOST_ID = ${hostId}
AND HOST_ID in (${hostIds})
GROUP BY HOST_ID, MAC, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr

SELECT HOST_ID as hostId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
MAC as mac,
ROUND(avgMerge(RX_DROP_AVG),2) as rxDropAvg, maxMerge(RX_DROP_MAX) as rxDropMax, minMerge(RX_DROP_MIN) as rxDropMin
ROUND(avgMerge(TX_DROP_AVG),2) as txDropAvg, maxMerge(TX_DROP_MAX) as txDropMax, minMerge(TX_DROP_MIN) as txDropMin
ROUND(avgMerge(RX_PACKETS_AVG),2) as rxPacketsAvg, maxMerge(RX_PACKETS_MAX) as rxPacketsMax, minMerge(RX_PACKETS_MIN) as rxPacketsMin
ROUND(avgMerge(TX_PACKETS_AVG),2) as txPacketsAvg, maxMerge(TX_PACKETS_MAX) as txPacketsMax, minMerge(TX_PACKETS_MIN) as txPacketsMin
FROM AGG_HOST_NIC_FLOW_5M detail WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND MAC = #{mac}
AND HOST_ID = ${hostId}
AND HOST_ID in (${hostIds})
GROUP BY HOST_ID, MAC, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr

SELECT HOST_ID as hostId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
any(MAC) as mac,
ROUND(sum(RX_FLOW_AVG * if((${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME)) > 300, 300, ${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME))),2) + ROUND(sum(TX_FLOW_AVG * if((${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME)) > 300, 300, ${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME))),2) as allFlowSum
ROUND(sum(RX_FLOW_AVG * if((${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME)) > 300, 300, ${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME))),2) rxFlowSum
ROUND(sum(TX_FLOW_AVG * if((${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME)) > 300, 300, ${endTime} - toUnixTimestamp(TIME))),2) txFlowSum
FROM (SELECT HOST_ID, TIME, MAC,
avgMerge(RX_FLOW_AVG) RX_FLOW_AVG, ROUND(avgMerge(TX_FLOW_AVG),2) TX_FLOW_AVG
avgMerge(RX_FLOW_AVG) RX_FLOW_AVG
avgMerge(TX_FLOW_AVG) TX_FLOW_AVG
FROM AGG_HOST_NIC_FLOW_5M WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND HOST_ID in (${hostIds})
GROUP BY HOST_POOL_ID, CLUSTER_ID, HOST_ID, MAC, TIME) FLOW GROUP BY HOST_ID, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr

SELECT HOST_ID as hostId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
any(MAC) as mac,
ROUND(avgMerge(RX_FLOW_AVG),2) as rxFlowAvg
ROUND(avgMerge(TX_FLOW_AVG),2) as txFlowAvg
FROM AGG_HOST_NIC_FLOW_5M detail WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND MAC = #{mac}
AND HOST_ID in (${hostIds})
GROUP BY HOST_ID, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr

SELECT HOST_ID as hostId,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d %H') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y %V') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y') as timeStr,
formatDateTime(toDateTime(TIME), '%Y-%m-%d') as timeStr,
any(MAC) as mac,
ROUND(avgMerge(RX_DROP_AVG),2) as rxDropAvg
ROUND(avgMerge(TX_DROP_AVG),2) as txDropAvg
ROUND(avgMerge(RX_PACKETS_AVG),2) as rxPacketsAvg
ROUND(avgMerge(TX_PACKETS_AVG),2) as txPacketsAvg
FROM AGG_HOST_NIC_FLOW_5M detail WHERE TIME BETWEEN ${startTime} AND ${endTime}
AND MAC = #{mac}
AND HOST_ID in (${hostIds})
GROUP BY HOST_ID, timeStr ORDER BY timeStr
